title: Q3 offsite Kanban setup (Pierre's canonical example)
description: A single, deceptively simple sentence hiding a multi-step composite task: a new project, a 3-column Kanban board, 10 tasks distributed across those columns, priorities, and due dates spread across a month. This is the scenario that motivated issue #173 (haiku needed ~38 calls against a hand-estimated optimal of 15 before the setup-kanban composite existed). optimalCallCount dropped from 15 to 1 once vikunja_projects setup-kanban shipped -- see also the setup-kanban-composite scenario, added alongside that composite.
promptTemplate: Set up a project called "{{prefix}}Q3 Offsite" to plan our Q3 offsite: a kanban board with three columns, ten tasks distributed across those columns, each task given a priority, and due dates spread across September 2026.
